gh_5145b0058c86e61c86bb13f5.title: [Joinville - SC] Senior Backend Software Engineer - Founding Team - NestJS / Node.js / Typescript 💶
gh_5145b0058c86e61c86bb13f5.description:
## About

We are a Logistics and Freight Technology Startup transforming road freight shipping. As a spinoff from a leading technology company in the logistics and transportation industry, we combine deep sector expertise with cutting-edge technology to innovate and push the logistics market forward. Our international team, based in the Netherlands and Brazil, is dedicated to entering and expanding new markets.

### Join our founding team

We are looking for talented senior software engineers to join as part of the founding team. Passionate about radically transforming the logistics sector. Join us to build a groundbreaking product and collaborate with some of the biggest international logistics and transport companies.

## Role

**Senior Backend Software Engineer / Software Developer - NestJS / Node.js / Typescript**

As a Senior Software Engineer you will work together with the team of 4 senior developers, you will be responsible for building new features, delivering complete end-to-end solutions. From concept to implementation, you will be involved in every stage of feature development. Roles require versatility, and you should be comfortable working across the full stack when necessary.

## Local

Hibrid in Joinville - SC
Travel to Amsterdam

## Requirements

### Responsibilities:
- Develop and implement new features for our platform.
- Work closely with the tech lead, other developers, and the Product Manager.
- Participate in Agile team activities, including daily stand-ups and weekly sprints.
- Ensure high code quality through code reviews and collaborative development practices.

### Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience in software development.
- Proficiency in backend development with Node.js and TypeScript.
- Experience with automation and infrastructure in AWS.
- Experience in building SaaS products.
- English speaker

### Preferred Experience:
- Familiarity with logistics and transportation industry
- Experience working remotely and exceptional organizational skills.
- Motivation and enthusiasm for tackling new project challenges from start to production.

## What We Offer:

- Join the founding team with ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan) 
- Competitive salary in Euros as a contractor (PJ).
- The opportunity to work with an international team.
- A dynamic and innovative environment where your ideas and contributions will make a real impact.
- Work with senior software engineers team
- The opportunity to grow in a international career
- Flexibility to work remotely. Hybrid in Joinville, SC, Brazil and travel to Amsterdam

## Contratação

PJ em Euros

## How to apply

If you are passionate about technology and eager to revolutionize the logistics industry, we would love to hear from you!

**Please only apply if you can travel to Joinville-SC**

Apply here: https://forms.gle/V1w15Djhg3oDoP7v8 

## Labels

<!-- Retire os labels que não fazem sentido à vaga. -->

### Nível

- Sênior
- Especialista

### Regime

- PJ
- Contrato

### Alocação

- Híbrido

gh_5102037c7d2ef00f074349ba.title: 8returns: Senior Frontend Engineer
gh_5102037c7d2ef00f074349ba.description: **Tags:** #react #saas #b2b #rails #ecommerce #javascript #ruby #front-end #senior #engineer #ruby **Published on:** October 31, 2021 **Original Job Post:** https://remoteOK.io/remote-jobs/106917-remote-senior-frontend-engineer-8returns ![](https://remoteOK.io/assets/img/jobs/fe4c69eaf06943b7cfd1668ef4a8fbdc1635680018.png) At 8returns, we're transforming one of the most frustrating, environmentally damaging and costly aspects of e-commerce — returns. Our customers love 8returns because it delivers a seamless returns experience, frees their team from tedious manual tasks and is more sustainable for our environment. We are funded by well-known industry leaders and early stage investors. As a small team, we’re all generalists and constantly picking up new challenges. When it comes to code, we’re looking to work with experienced people who can pick a problem and solve it. If you are someone with a strong drive to build something new, while tackling any obstacles in your way, and motivated by constantly learning and becoming better, 8returns is for you. ### **What you’ll do:** You'll be one of the first engineers and a member of the founding team, joining a team of 5 engineers. You will work closely with our founder and product lead to create and implement the front-end for our products. This requires you to take product ownership, initiative, be creative and reliable. Our stack is Ruby on Rails + Postgres + React. ### **Who You Are:** We're looking for an experienced Frontend Software Engineer to join our engineering team. Someone who has a solid understanding of web technologies and wants to help design, implement, and launch major user-facing features. You should have senior level experience (~5 years) building modern frontend applications in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, with at least 3 years of that experience using React. You should have significant experience designing, debugging, and optimizing frontend applications to make them fast and reliable. You have significant experience with REST APIs and thoroughly understand HTTP requests. You have experience participating in code reviews and providing overall code quality suggestions to help maintain the structure and quality of the codebase. You should have great product sense and be able to think through user experience issues before diving into the code, and you exhibit a love for great UI. You’re comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with a small and talented team where you're supported in your efforts to grow professionally. You are able to manage your time well, communicate effectively and collaborate in a fully distributed team. You’ll be able to work remotely and (mostly) set your own schedule. ## Why join us? ### Shape the direction of the company as an early team member Work towards creating something that will be experienced by millions of people every day. ### Work from anywhere We have a hybrid work culture. We have our HQ in Berlin but we want to build the best team, so we're committed to hiring excellent team members from `anywhere`. ### We're a team that knows all this work is only worth it if you enjoy it We make sure to make the journey just as rewarding and fun as the outcome. ### **Backed by successful entrepreneurs and VCs** We are funded by well-known industry leaders and early stage investors. Be sure to mention the words **CAPITAL MINOR SUBJECT** when applying to show you read the job post completely. This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human. #Salary and compensation No salary data published by company so we estimated salary based on previous jobs related to . $50,000 — $90,000/year ### Location 🌏 Worldwide
